title: Dynamic Trees - Croptopia
description: Compatibility mod between Dynamic Trees and Croptopia
body:
[Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) | [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia)

![DTCroptopia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TIF8EckY/images/8af4130fd4a720ac10ea262e27a97c506977e3b8.png)

![[Discord Link](https://discord.com/invite/A4FCBS3)](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)

# **Overview**

This mod makes Croptopia's trees compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing versions of trees added by said mod, and fully replacing them during world generation.
The trees, their behavior and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs.

This is not a fork from Dynamic Trees Croptopia by TheThonk, it's forked from DynamicTrees PHC2. Thanks to MaxHyper for this addon.



# **Features**
## **Included Trees:**

- Almond
- Apricot
- Avocado
- Banana
- Cashew
- Cherry
- Coconut
- Date
- Dragonfruit
- Fig
- Grapefruit
- Kumquat
- Lemon
- Lime
- Mango
- Nectarine
- Nutmeg
- Orange
- Peach
- Pear
- Pecan
- Persimmon
- Plum
- Starfruit
- Walnut

## World Gen:

Croptopia Trees generate in the world. The generation can be customized through the use of treepacks.
Check [Croptopia's wiki](https://croptopia.fandom.com/wiki/Crops#TreeCrops) to know where they are found.

# **Other Addons**
 
Dynamic Trees addons for other mods can be found in the [Dynamic Trees wiki](https://github.com/DynamicTreesTeam/DynamicTrees/wiki).

**Suggestions and Requests:**

To request a new mod for compatibility, please do it [here](https://github.com/orgs/DynamicTreesTeam/discussions/categories/compatibility-addon-suggestions)!! 




**Requirements**
- [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) 
- [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia)




# **Licensing and Mod Packs**

You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask.
This mod has an MIT licence and its source is public on GitHub.
